title: Clarify historical spec/lichen-native titles and legacy guarantees
description: Decision follow-up from project-LICHEN-py4c.1.18. The spec/lichen-native directory is marked historical, but headings and body text still say LICHEN Native Protocol and transport-agnostic device interface in ways that can be quoted out of context. Tighten historical wording without deleting the canonical legacy reference.
acceptance_criteria: Spec docs state that legacy CBOR framing is frozen/prototype-only, has no new-feature guarantee, and must not be called the native LCI contract. Contract tests cover the wording and existing historical legacy tests still pass.
close_reason: Updated all spec/lichen-native/*.md files with (Historical) titles and FROZEN/PROTOTYPE-ONLY status. Updated contract tests. All 8 LCI contract tests pass.
